rubrics.name: Scope of Thinking
rubrics.description:
1: Focuses only on own tasks or team
2: Mentions organization but stays team centric
3: Connects team actions to wider organization
4: Thinks across functions, systems, and outcomes

rubrics.name: Ownership & Accountability
rubrics.description:
1: Emphasizes following instructions or escalation
2: Partial ownership, still dependent on seniors
3: Takes ownership within role boundaries
4: Owns outcomes beyond role boundaries

rubrics.name: Trade off Awareness
rubrics.description:
1: No mention of trade offs or consequences
2: Mentions pressure but no clear choices
3: Acknowledges delivery vs people trade offs
4: Clearly articulates conscious trade offs

rubrics.name: Leadership Role Clarity
rubrics.description:
1: Generic leadership language (motivate, communicate)
2: Describes manager duties, not leadership impact
3: Shows shift from “doer” to “enabler”
4: Clearly articulates leadership impact on enterprise outcomes
